name: Basingstoke South

locations.name: Northern Police Investigation Centre
locations.address: Jays Close, Viables Business Park, Basingstoke

description:
Basingstoke South consists of Brighton Hill and Hatch Warren, Beggawood and Kempshott

To receive up to date crime prevention information and alerts from you local policing team please sign up to Hampshire Alert - www.hampshirealert.co.uk - You can choose what sort of information you would like to receive and how and when you would like to receive it, when you sign up to ensure you only get information that you feel is relevant for you.

Hampshire Alert is also linked to the Neighbourhood Watch network so anyone in a scheme can also access information about their specific Watch and neighbourhood policing teams can communicate directly with NHW members.
